_meta.schema_note: SEED FILE - all unit_cost_ils values are supplier costs (what Bold pays). Client price = unit_cost_ils * 1.15 (derived by script, NEVER stored here). Source events scanned: רמלה (Jan 2026, 250p), MAN שורק x5 (2022-2026, 150-600p), סופרין ירושלים (Apr 2025, 250p), סופרין לזרוס (Jun 2023, 100p), מכשירי תנועה שורק (May 2022, 600-1000p), יהוד כנס (Oct 2023, 600p+2days), MAN מרץ 2023 (200p), Phoenix art quotes (Apr 2026).
_meta.pricing_notes: Column 'עלות יחידה' = supplier cost. Column 'מחיר יח' = client price (not stored). Where ranges appear across events, midpoint or most-recent value used as primary; range captured in notes. CPI index Jan 2022 base vs today ~15-18% cumulative - use CPI table for older quotes.

vendors.notes: Mid-range full-service catering. Finger food or plated. Used consistently for MAN events 2022-2026.

items.item_name: קייטרינג פינגר פוד / צלחת מזלג - שירות מלא + כלים
items.notes: 600-1000 guests. Finger food from stations and circulating waiters. Range 2022-2026: 105-220 ש"ח/guest depending on menu type and year. Budget: 105. Premium: 220.

items.item_name: בר שתיה - קלה + אספרסו + יין + בירה (שירות מלא + כוסות)
items.notes: Coke products + espresso + red+white wine (Teperberg Vizion) + Tuborg/Carlsberg beer + staff + cups. 600-1000p. Range across years: 39-45 ש"ח/guest.

items.item_name: קייטרינג בשרי כולל צוות וכלים (6 שעות)
items.notes: 100-180 guests, outdoor. High-quality disposable tableware.

items.item_name: קייטרינג חלבי - מגשי אירוח + צוות + כלים
items.notes: Supplementary dairy trays. Used alongside meat offering.

vendors.notes: Premium full-service catering. Price includes full waitstaff (25 waiters) and event manager.

items.item_name: קייטרינג פרימיום - שירות מלא 25 מלצרים + מנהל
items.notes: Derived: 121,500 for 250p. Includes 25 waiters and manager. Outdoor event.

vendors.notes: Cocktail-style catering (fork buffet). High-quality disposable tableware.

items.item_name: קוקטייל צלחת מזלג - חד"פ איכותי + צוות
items.notes: 250 guests. Includes reinforced service staff. Reusable glasses extra (25 ש"ח/guest).

vendors.notes: Catering for conferences and seminars. Dairy hospitality trays + bar. Used at סופרין לזרוס 100p.

items.item_name: מגשי אירוח חלביים - חד"פ איכותי (ללא צוות)
items.notes: 100 guests. Hospitality trays, quality disposable tableware. No staff included.

items.item_name: בר שתיה קלה + חמה + אספרסו (כוסות חד"פ איכותי)
items.notes: 100 guests. Includes espresso bar. Quality disposable cups.
Hospitality staff per event. Range: 150-500 ש"ח/person depending on hours and event type.

vendors.notes: Food truck. Shawarma + chips + salads + cold + hot drinks included. Used for MAN sales day March 2023.

items.notes: 200 guests (150 customers + staff). Includes hot + cold beverages. Budget: 12,000; full price: 22,000 (difference may be subsidy/partial cost).

vendors.notes: Conference/seminar catering. Hospitality trays style. 2-day event (Yehud, 600p + day 2).

items.notes: 350 guests (out of 600 total for 2-day event). Midpoint used. Full day 2 refreshment station: 1,500 ש"ח/100p.
Conference-style bar. Range: 10-12 ש"ח/guest for soft drinks + coffee.

vendors.notes: Bar service including staff and cups. Espresso bar always included. Consistent Bold vendor.

items.item_name: בר - שתיה קלה + אספרסו + בירה (ללא יין) + צוות
items.notes: 250p. Without wine. Includes staff. Disposable cups extra (7 ש"ח/cup).

items.item_name: בר - שתיה קלה + אספרסו + יין + בירה (שירות מלא)
items.notes: 250 guests. Full bar including wine. Reusable cups separate.
Day 2 of conference, smaller group. Coffee station.

vendors.notes: Reusable cups supply and collection. Often via Shar. Range 7-8.5 ש"ח/cup.

items.notes: 600-1000p event used 1000 cups at 7-8 ש"ח. Range across events: 7-8.5 ש"ח/cup. 7 is midpoint.

vendors.notes: AV, lighting and electrical. Core Bold vendor. Used across all scales.

items.notes: 600-1000p outdoor. External display lighting + catering/entrance/branding lighting + PA for band + speeches + power runs.
250p indoor. Stage + kitchen power, lobby + outdoor lighting, full PA for speeches and band.
300p indoor. Catering/entrance/stage lighting + background music + soloists + speeches + power runs.

items.item_name: הגברה לדוברים + מוסיקת רקע + פריסות חשמל (אאוטדור, 250p)
items.notes: Outdoor 250p. Background music + speeches only.

items.item_name: הגברה מוסיקת רקע + פריסות חשמל (אינדור, קטן, 100-180p)
items.notes: Small indoor event. Background music only.
Stage LED screen + marketing display screen.
Facade lighting. Add-on to base AV package.
Add-on speaker PA for live musician. Small conference.

vendors.notes: Screen systems: LED, projectors, CCTV, VJ. Used for large MAN events at Shorek.

items.notes: LED screen behind stage. Range seen: 4,500-8,750 ש"ח. 6,750 is consistent actual cost.
Conference LED screen. 600p event.
Monitor-sized LED screen with dedicated technician. Small conference (100p).
Multiple projection installations for showroom walls.

items.notes: Outdoor LED. Ramla event behind stage.

items.notes: 13 brand information panels. Large showroom event.

items.notes: Stage with black carpet. 2.4x4.8m, 50cm height.
Includes black carpet cover.

items.item_name: קירות תערוכה לבנים - חבילה גדולה (39.04 מ' + 20 מחיצות)

vendors.notes: Generator rental including full power distribution.

Main + backup generator. 2-day fuel included. 600-1000p outdoor.

vendors.notes: Engineering approvals: structural, electrical, safety.

Structural engineer for temporary builds. Conference/outdoor.

vendors.notes: Shade net for outdoor daytime events.

items.notes: Range: 8,500-10,000 ש"ח depending on area and color.

Hostess backdrop. Range: 1,000-1,600 ש"ח.
Branded lectern (jointly with Shar). Range: 250-650 ש"ח.

vendors.notes: Large-format outdoor branding, building wraps, monumental installations.

vendors.notes: Branded wall systems for indoor events.

items.notes: Lobby, elevator area, stage backdrop, buffet backdrop, sales station.

vendors.notes: Branded wall and signage printing/installation (separate from Doran screens).

items.notes: Fence, registration area, hall entrance wall, entrance wall including hangings. 100p conference.

vendors.notes: Graphic design for events. Budget range by scope.

items.notes: Full event branding: digital invite, STD, all signage and branded elements. Range: 2,000-8,000 ש"ח by scope.

items.notes: Invitation + branded walls + flags + signage. Print-ready.

vendors.notes: Brand strategy firm. Full brand development. 6-stage process.

items.notes: Research + brand strategy (14 days), brand language + name (30 days), toolkit + brand guide (7-14 days), vendor briefings. Excludes image purchase and international travel.

vendors.notes: Carpets, synthetic grass, wall stickers.

items.notes: 200m red carpet including adhesive installation.

items.notes: Large wall sticker for showroom interior. High-altitude installation.
